name: Potential Archive of Collected Data
notes: This is rule triggers when data is archived or compressed for exfiltration. An adversary may compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: NTDS Exfiltration Command, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Data Compressed - PowerShell
TD_list: APPLY Potential Archive of Collected Data on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: NTDS Exfiltration Command, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Data Compressed - PowerShell
RED_list: Event name: Potential Archive of Collected Data

Event description: Detects when data is archived or compressed for exfiltration. An adversary may compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
